name: Froyo Cafe
description: Froyo is a manufacturer specializing in fresh, non-fat frozen yogurt that contains no added sugar or preservatives. The company offers a diverse selection of yogurt flavors and fresh toppings, emphasizing quality and customer experience.

name: Yogurtini KC
description: Yogurtini specializes in frozen yogurt, providing a rotating selection of 10-16 flavors and over 65 toppings, allowing customers to create personalized treats.

name: All American Foods, Inc.
description: The company, All American Foods, offers a diverse Pro Mix® line of functional ingredients that could be relevant for frozen yogurt applications, including flavorings and dairy substitutes. Their commitment to innovative food ingredient solutions positions them as a key player in enhancing food products like frozen yogurt.

name: Yo-get-it Frozen Yoget Bars
description: Yo-get-it is a prominent manufacturer and retailer of frozen yogurt, offering a variety of unique, all-natural flavors and a self-serve experience that allows customers to personalize their servings. With a strong presence in Australia and expansion into China, Yo-get-it has positioned itself as a key player in the frozen yogurt market.

name: Pinkberry
description: Pinkberry is a prominent producer of premium frozen yogurt, recognized for its distinctive offerings and commitment to exceptional customer service. The brand has carved out a unique identity in the frozen yogurt market since its inception in 2005.

name: Gloria
description: Gloria is a prominent player in the Peruvian dairy market and offers a variety of dairy products, including yogurt. Their brand is well-regarded in the food and beverage sector, highlighting their expertise in yogurt production.

name: 五得利面粉集团有限公司
description: Nanci’s Frozen Yogurt is a leading manufacturer and wholesaler of soft-serve mixes, offering over 100 flavors of frozen yogurt. With over 25 years of experience and a strong focus on research and development, the company provides high-quality, healthy frozen yogurt products that are easy to use and perfect for various applications.

name: Snog Frozen Yogurt
description: Snog Frozen Yogurt is a manufacturer and distributor known for its delicious low-calorie, fat-free frozen yogurt, sweetened with low-GI Agave nectar and enriched with probiotics. They operate through retail, licensing, and manufacturing, offering unique Snog Shops and convenient Snog Tubs in various venues.

name: Yolato
description: Yolato is a supplier of all-natural soft-serve frozen yogurt, emphasizing the use of local dairies and ensuring their products are free from artificial ingredients and gluten.

name: Red Mango
description: Red Mango is dedicated to offering high-quality, all-natural nonfat frozen yogurt, highlighting their commitment to healthy and delicious treats.
